commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e4913328c519bf63d1067cb9cdf2d157089ad517)
commands.review_summary:
The branch imports `pinActivePluginHttpRouteRegistry` and calls it from `pinGatewayPluginRuntimeRegistries` during gateway plugin bootstrap.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the reported path runs through post-ready runtime plugin prewarm and `ensureRuntimePluginsLoaded` without the gateway attachment/service lifecycle that the PR would need to update. I did not run a live packaged curl/service reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the required repair is a broader gateway lifecycle change than this branch currently makes.

target.title: fix(plugins): pin HTTP route registry during gateway bootstrap
target.body:
Fixes #94572

## Summary

Workspace plugins loaded via `plugins.load.paths` can register HTTP routes via `api.registerHttpRoute(...)` during `register(api)`, but these routes are never wired into the running gateway because `pinGatewayPluginRuntimeRegistries` was missing `pinActivePluginHttpRouteRegistry`.

`replaceAttachedPluginRuntime` (used during reloads) already calls all three pin functions; this fix aligns the initial bootstrap path.

## Root Cause

The gateway bootstrap path calls `pinGatewayPluginRuntimeRegistries` which pins channel and session registries, but omitted HTTP route registry. During reloads, `replaceAttachedPluginRuntime` correctly pins all three, creating an inconsistency between initial load and reload.

## Changes

- `src/gateway/server-plugin-bootstrap.ts`: Add `pinActivePluginHttpRouteRegistry` call, matching the reload path.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Workspace plugin HTTP routes are now wired into the gateway during initial bootstrap, matching reload behavior.

**Evidence after fix**:

```diff
  pinActivePluginChannelRegistry(pluginRegistry);
+ pinActivePluginHttpRouteRegistry(pluginRegistry);
  pinActivePluginSessionExtensionRegistry(pluginRegistry);
```

All three registry pin functions are now called consistently in both bootstrap and reload paths.

**What was not tested**: End-to-end with a live workspace plugin registering HTTP routes.

## Risk

- [x] Backwards compatible (no config changes)
- [x] Follows existing pattern

Closes: #94572
target.author: ajwan8998
